description: Golden trace for signal registration-order parity. Godot fires callbacks in connection insertion order and the trace records one SignalEmit per emit_signal call.
scenario: Three receivers connected to one emitter in order A, B, C. Single emission produces one SignalEmit trace event. Callbacks fire A then B then C.
notes: Trace records the emission event, not individual callback invocations. Callback ordering is verified separately via side-effect recording.
